changeSet.author: abocoum
changeSet.sql: drop schema if exists workflow cascade; create schema if not exists workflow;

changeSet.author: bsic
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO structure (code, name, type, status, created_at, updated_at) SELECT age, lib, 'AGENCY', 'ACTIVE', NOW(), NOW() FROM bkage

changeSet.author: bsic
changeSet.sql: UPDATE bkage SET id_structure = s.id FROM structure s WHERE s.code = bkage.age
